name: Spy Hunter
description: Spy Hunter is a top-down, vertically scrolling driving game where the player controls an armed sports car, the Interceptor. The primary objective is to survive as long as possible while eliminating enemy vehicles and avoiding civilian traffic. The Interceptor navigates a continuously scrolling road, which includes bridges, tunnels, and forks, leading to different environments. Enemies consist of various types of cars and helicopters intent on destroying the player's vehicle. These enemies employ tactics such as ramming, shooting, and dropping oil slicks. The Interceptor is equipped with machine guns as its default weapon and can acquire additional weapons from a support van that occasionally appears. These additional weapons include oil slicks, smoke screens, and missiles. The oil slick and smoke screen are defensive weapons to deter enemy pursuers, whereas the missiles are more effective weapons against cars and helicopters. Collisions with enemies, civilian cars, or certain roadside objects deplete the Interceptor's health. When the Interceptor is heavily damaged it is temporarily replaced by a less effective vehicle. The game ends when the replacement vehicle is destroyed. The Interceptor can enter a weapons van where it can be repaired and re-equipped with special weapons.

controls.shift: Cycle through available special weapons (Oil Slick, Smoke Screen, Missiles)
